import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

for split in ['train','test']:
    in_path = Path(f'/app/data/{split}-00000-of-00001.parquet')
    out_path = Path(f'/app/{split}.txt')
    if out_path.exists():
        print(f'{out_path} already exists')
        continue
    df = pd.read_parquet(in_path, columns=['label','text'])
    with out_path.open('w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for label, text in zip(df['label'], df['text']):
            text = str(text).replace('\n', ' ').replace('\r', ' ').replace('\t', ' ')
            f.write(f'__label__{int(label)+1} {text}\n')
    print(out_path, out_path.stat().st_size)
